overview: KaasFlow is a mobile-first SaaS app for small-scale financiers in India to manage clients, loans, EMI collections, and send WhatsApp payment reminders. Features admin and staff roles, photo capture for client profiles, PDF receipts, Excel/CSV exports, Tamil/English support, dark/light mode, and a subscription system with trial logic.
features: Admin and Staff role-based access control
Client management with camera photo capture
EMI payment tracking with overdue highlighting
Daily collection mode with mark paid/missed
Analytics dashboard with Chart.js bar chart
Multi-tier subscriptions: Free, Monthly ₹270, Quarterly ₹850, Yearly ₹1999
Daily 12AM browser notifications for collection dues
Individual collection reminders at due time
PIN change in Settings with validation
Mobile-first 430px layout with bottom navigation bar
